> **Critical vulnerabilities**: Do NOT use this template. Instead, use [GitHub Private Security Advisory](https://github.com/DrewDawson2027/claude-lead-system/security/advisories/new) for responsible disclosure. See [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/DrewDawson2027/claude-lead-system/blob/main/docs/SECURITY.md) for our disclosure policy.

**Component affected**
e.g. sidecar auth, hooks, installer, coordinator input validation

**Description**
What is the security concern?

**Steps to reproduce**

1. ...
2. ...

**Impact assessment**
What could an attacker achieve? What are the prerequisites (local access, network access, etc)?

**Suggested fix (optional)**
If you have ideas on how to address this.

- OS:
- Claude Code version:
